decodable_text: Jane has a cake. The cake is by the lake. Jane will wave at the gate. It is not too late to bake a cake and skate by the lake.

decodable_text: Ray and May like to play. They play in the hay all day. May will stay and play with clay. Ray runs on the gray path. It is a fun day to play!

home_practice_text: We play all day. May will stay in the hay. Ray has gray clay. It is a fun day.
